message:
feat(ftui-tty): opportunistic nonblocking drain in read_event()

When the reader is nonblocking, drain any newly-arrived bytes before
returning None from read_event(). This reduces poll(2) syscalls in
bursty workloads by allowing the consumer's drain loop to pick up
additional input without requiring another poll_event() round-trip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
